Session-counter test step 1: copy single rung from row 1
Session-counter test step 2: duplicate same rung to row 2, copy only row 2
Session-counter test step 3: copy rows 1 and 2 together
Session-counter monotonic test step 1: copy same single rung (same window/session)
Session-counter monotonic test step 2: repeat same single rung copy (same window/session)
Session-counter monotonic test step 3: repeat same single rung copy (same window/session)
Cross-app counter test step 1: source copy from Click App A
Cross-app counter test step 2: paste into Click App B then copy back from App B
Cross-app counter test step 3: optional recopy from Click App A after transfer
Cross-UID prompt YES step 1: copy source rung from App A
Cross-UID prompt YES step 2: paste into App B and choose YES on update-metadata prompt, then copy
Cross-UID prompt YES step 3: recopy original rung from App A
Cross-UID prompt NO step 1: copy source rung from App A
Cross-UID prompt NO step 2: paste into App B and choose NO on update-metadata prompt, then copy
Cross-UID prompt NO step 3: recopy original rung from App A
